title: Sanji Returns to Luffy
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Reiju, Sanji, Luffy, Nami as Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the assassination plot against Big Mom begins taking shape.
scene: Sanji and Luffy reunite emotionally, turning the rescue mission into a direct conspiracy against Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're all on the lookout.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: mirro- world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mirrors! Do seriously none of you have any in- formation...

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: Regarding Luffy and Sanji's where- abouts?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I just don't see them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't think I've seen either of them pass by anytime recently.

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: What about Sanji's room?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Some weird dude is sleeping in there in place of him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they're not inside the castle... I do have an idea of where they might be.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no mirror that can take us directly there...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I'm thinking of the place where those two fought this morning.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What AAAAAAAAAAAAA AAAat?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: luffy and Sanji...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Had a fight?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sanji himself must've come here for some important role he had to fulfil as a Vinsmoke.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I doubt it'll be easy to convince him to return!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, if this is precisely the plan, we must haste!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The new

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was planning on telling you all after we had everybody back in here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the truth is, if we let the wedding ceremony occur tomorrow...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It will be no mere ceremony to say the least!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You all came here with Pekoms, correct?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh... Pekoms! We ended up getting separated... but are you okay?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He's all right now. However, before...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was about to meet his doom through a certain plot that he was part of.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we hadn't noticed this, he would've been dead by now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...you hear a gunshot?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Er... well it's raining too hard to quite tell.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I do hear a barking dog though.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: DAMN...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Those bastards...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: BARK! Back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: 6th Floor: Baun Guest- Room.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ARE YOU ALL...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Even HU...MAN? HIC O

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pathetic. These girls all work at a bar, why are they falling over from this weak alcohol?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they're gonna get us girls, I would've preferred that one chick Sanji's friends with.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know exactly what you mean! That Nami chick, right?! Her lion personality is definitely my type. :)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard that they've captured her... so maybe tumor- row, I'll see if I can bargain to have it for ourselves.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: GULP...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Well then...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's give the drinking a little rest, shall we?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If there's any time we must party, it'll be tomorrow night.

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Sanji Returns storyline with 43 dialogue beats. Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the crew joins Bege’s risky plan to attack Big Mom during the tea party.
